name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – Dec 2021
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here are the changes to Neto by Maropost for December 2021. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"  "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Updates","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Removed redundancy in eBay revision tasks when updating price only."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Couriers Please service codes have been updated to the latest version."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where sales orders were not marked as \"Invoiced\" when approved manually in some circumstances."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue with StarTrack where multiple articles would compound shipping costs using the API rates."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
